PROP-01b-partial1-inv-015.text: checkUpkeep iterates all allowlisted assets; unbounded asset count may exceed block gas limit.
PROP-01b-partial1-inv-015.assertion: forall checkUpkeep(): gas_consumed(loop) < block.gasLimit for all possible s_allowlistedAssets sizes

locations.note: unbounded loop over s_allowlistedAssets with per-asset price oracle calls
